test_suite: Atlas Terraform Harden Skills - Skill Invocation Tests
description: Validates that atlas-terraform-aws-harden, atlas-terraform-azure-harden, and atlas-terraform-gcp-harden trigger on the right prompts and do not conflict with atlas-terraform-getting-started or other skills. Tests boundaries between harden skills and getting-started, natural-language-querying, schema-design, search-and-ai.

test_cases.prompt: I have an Atlas cluster running. How do I add AWS PrivateLink to it using Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: User has existing cluster and wants AWS PrivateLink — harden skill, not getting-started

test_cases.prompt: Add KMS encryption at rest to my Atlas cluster on AWS with Terraform
test_cases.reasoning: KMS/CMEK is a harden-skill trigger on AWS

test_cases.prompt: How do I set up backup export to S3 for my Atlas cluster via Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: S3 backup export is an explicit trigger for the AWS harden skill

test_cases.prompt: I want to harden my Atlas cluster with AWS security features using Terraform
test_cases.reasoning: Explicit harden intent with AWS + Atlas + Terraform

test_cases.prompt: Add Azure Private Link to my existing Atlas cluster using Terraform
test_cases.reasoning: Azure Private Link request — triggers azure-harden, not aws-harden

test_cases.prompt: Enable Azure Key Vault CMEK encryption for my Atlas cluster via Terraform
test_cases.reasoning: Azure Key Vault CMEK is an explicit trigger for the azure-harden skill

test_cases.prompt: Set up Atlas backup export to Azure Blob Storage with Terraform
test_cases.reasoning: Azure Blob backup export is an explicit trigger for the azure-harden skill

test_cases.prompt: How do I add GCP Private Service Connect to my Atlas cluster using Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: GCP Private Service Connect is an explicit trigger for the gcp-harden skill

test_cases.prompt: Enable Cloud KMS encryption at rest for my Atlas cluster on GCP with Terraform
test_cases.reasoning: Cloud KMS on GCP is an explicit trigger for gcp-harden

test_cases.prompt: Add GCS backup export to my existing Atlas GCP cluster via Terraform
test_cases.reasoning: GCS backup export is an explicit trigger for gcp-harden

test_cases.prompt: I want to create a new MongoDB Atlas cluster on AWS using Terraform
test_cases.reasoning: New cluster creation — getting-started skill, not harden

test_cases.prompt: Help me get started with the MongoDB Atlas Terraform provider for Azure
Write a MongoDB query to find all orders in the last 7 days
Should I embed user sessions in the user document or use a separate sessions collection?
test_cases.reasoning: Schema design question — no Terraform intent

test_cases.prompt: How do I create a full-text Atlas Search index using Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: Atlas Search index management is out of scope for all harden skills

test_cases.prompt: How do I secure my Atlas cluster with Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: Secure/harden intent with Atlas + Terraform — defaults to aws-harden (most common cloud), skill should ask for cloud provider

test_cases.prompt: I just deployed my Atlas cluster with Terraform using the getting-started guide. Now I want to add PrivateLink and KMS encryption on AWS.
test_cases.reasoning: User completed getting-started and now wants hardening — triggers aws-harden
